user.title: Set up UbiBot
user.description: Enter your **API key**. With an **Account Key** all your devices are listed and you pick which to add — no Channel ID needed. Only if you use a **Read Key**, also enter its Channel ID below.

data.channel: Channel ID (only for a Read Key)

data_description.channel: Leave empty when using an Account Key.

select.title: Choose devices
select.description: Select the UbiBot devices you want to add. A read-only key is created for each of them automatically.

limited.title: Read key limit reached
limited.description: These devices already have the maximum of 10 read keys, so an existing key is reused: {channels}. Everything still works — just click Submit.

reauth_confirm.title: UbiBot – update credentials
reauth_confirm.description: The key for {channels} is no longer valid. Enter a new Account Key (recommended) or, for a single device, a new Read Key.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – please check your key (and Channel ID) and try again.
error.account_key_invalid: That is not a valid Account Key. If you are using a Read Key, please also enter its Channel ID.
error.no_selection: Please select at least one device.
error.need_account_key: This entry has several devices – please use an Account Key to renew it.

abort.no_new_devices: All your UbiBot devices are already added.
